hook: Attraction grows faster when seriousness and play can coexist.
body: People trust chemistry more when it does not force them to choose between fun and sincerity.

hook: Some men hide all sincerity behind jokes because directness feels too vulnerable.
body: Use humor to keep the exchange alive, then let sincerity confirm that you are real.

hook: Use humor to keep the exchange alive, then let sincerity confirm that you are real.
body: A playful moment followed by one straightforward sentence about your interest can feel mature instead of evasive.

body: After a joking beat lands, practice saying one honest thing without changing the vibe into a confession scene.
